Featured Entrepreneur

Nozipho Tshabalala

Founder, The Conversation Strategists

She has built a global strategic dialogue platform rooted in African leadership conversations and institutional insight.

This profile is part of the RFTT entrepreneur archive, where lived entrepreneurial journeys are translated into structured insight for institutions, educators, and ecosystem partners.

Mini Bio

Entrepreneur Details

Nozipho Tshabalala is a globally recognised moderator, entrepreneur, and strategic communications expert known for shaping high-level conversations across business, policy, and society. She is the founder of The Conversation Strategists, a company that facilitates impactful dialogue for global institutions and leaders. With a background in economics and international relations, she has moderated platforms such as the World Economic Forum, bringing clarity and depth to complex global issues. Passionate about the power of dialogue, she uses her voice to drive meaningful engagement, influence decision-making, and elevate African perspectives on the global stage.

Invite Nozipho Tshabalala

Use this profile to brief your team, then send a booking request with Nozipho Tshabalala already selected in the contact form.

Suitable for keynotes, moderated conversations, classroom sessions, founder talks, strategy workshops, and panel discussions.

Our team will confirm availability, format, and engagement fit once the request is received.
